settings.text: We’re excited to announce the 10 winners of our JASPAL x GODZILLA campaign! Each winner will receive movie tickets to see Godzilla Final Wars (2004) at Paragon Cineplex, Siam Paragon, on 19 October 2025, at 7:00 PM.

Announcing the 10 lucky winners of Godzilla Final Wars (2004), with 2 tickets per winner.

  1. Jiradech Sonthipet
  2. Krittanai Asanprakit
  3. Amit Gulabani
  4. สุเมธ กุณฑลวรรณ
  5. Karanee Laohatrakoon
  6. คณัสพิสิษฐ์ แก้วระย้า
  7. ทศิน ตรีรัตนกูล
  8. ดิเรกฤทธิ์ ประสานพิมพ์
  9. Patraporn Inbumrung
  10. เอกชัย เสรีโยธิน

*The team will reach out to the winners to verify their availability for the prize.

HOW TO JOIN THE CAMPAIGN FOR GODZILLA FINAL WARS (2004) MOVIE TICKETS

  • 10 winners will each receive two tickets to the screening of Godzilla Final Wars (2004) on October 19, 2025, at 7:00 PM.
  • Announcement: Winners will be announced on October 17, 2025, on www.jaspal.com.
  • Confirmation: Winners must confirm their eligibility on October 17, 2025, between 9:00 AM and 6:00 PM.
  • Ticket Collection: Tickets can be collected on October 19, 2025, at Paragon Cineplex, 5th floor, Siam Paragon, before 7:00 PM. ID must be presented. (Registration begins at 6:00 PM. The movie starts at 7:00 PM.)
  • If eligibility is not confirmed or terms are unmet, the prize will be awarded to an alternate winner. 
  • Cancellations and refunds are not permitted post-confirmation.
  • Each member is eligible for one prize only.
  • *Participation indicates acceptance of these terms and conditions

• By participating in this promotion, you confirm that you have read and agreed to the terms and conditions outlined on our website. For more information, please visit: https://www.jaspal.com/policies/terms-of-service
  • The company reserves the right to reject any returned or exchanged items, including promotional items, in any circumstance.
  • Shipping cost is not included.
  • The offers cannot be exchanged for cash or other items or transferred to others.
  • Find further details about our returns and exchanges policy at https://www.jaspal.com/policies/refund-policy
  • For additional information, don't hesitate to contact us at Tel: 02-118-2000 or email: customerservice@jaspal.co.th. Our office hours are Monday through Sunday, 09:00 to 18:00.
